Strategy name: Intervene with patients/consumers to enhance uptake and adherence

Strategy name: Intervene with patients/consumers to enhance uptake and adherence

Rationale: The study implemented an intervention that included advance text message notifications and a series of automated and live phone call reminders to encourage patients to complete the mailed FIT test, which directly aligns with the strategy of intervening with patients to enhance uptake.

Textual Evidence: As a ﬁrst step in planning for regional scale-up, our project has created a website housed on the PRC’s website to disseminate Med-South materials and online training modules.
Rationale: The research team is using their Prevention Research Center (PRC) as an organization to begin disseminating Med-South materials and training, which aligns with identifying an organization responsible for dissemination.
